prompt: A high-angle, top-down cinematic portrait of a young woman with wavy brown hair looking directly up at the camera with a soft, soulful expression. She is holding a bouquet of deep red roses wrapped in brown craft paper. She wears a simple black long-sleeved top and a yellow crossbody bag. The scene is set on a brick pathway during golden hour, with soft, hazy sunlight filtering through the background creating a dreamlike glow. The photography style features a shallow depth of field with a heavy film grain and a vintage, nostalgic color palette.
